name: Taako's Cogs
author: Taako
description: A collection of high-quality cogs for Red-DiscordBot, including captcha verification, invite tracking, suggestions, reputation, reviews, support tickets, temporary voice channels, roleplay tools, admin utilities, and RandomWeather.
install_msg: Thank you for adding Taako's Cogs! Use `[p]repo list` to see available cogs.
